fs-all API

Packages
Package
Description
javax.annotation
For jsr305.
javax.annotation.concurrent
 
javax.annotation.meta
 
space.sunqian.annotation
Annotations package, contains annotations supporting simple static analyses.
space.sunqian.fs
The root package of fs, provides root supports for fs:
space.sunqian.fs.asm
The built-in ASM package, from the ASM framework, provides a small and fast bytecode manipulation framework.
space.sunqian.fs.asm.signature
Provides support for type signatures.
space.sunqian.fs.base
This package is the base package for this lib, provides basic supports.
space.sunqian.fs.base.bytes
Provides utilities and classes for byte.
space.sunqian.fs.base.chars
Provides utilities and classes for char and charset.
space.sunqian.fs.base.date
Provides utilities and interfaces for date and time.
space.sunqian.fs.base.exception
Provides utilities and common exceptions.
space.sunqian.fs.base.function
Provides extensions functional interfaces.
space.sunqian.fs.base.lang
This package provides extensions and enhancements for language: EnumKit CodingKit
space.sunqian.fs.base.logging
Provides utilities and classes for logging.
space.sunqian.fs.base.math
Provides utilities for math.
space.sunqian.fs.base.number
Provides utilities and interfaces for number options.
space.sunqian.fs.base.option
Provides option interfaces and utilities.
space.sunqian.fs.base.process
Provides utilities and classes for process.
space.sunqian.fs.base.random
Provides interfaces for random, including random number-Rng and random object-Rog.
space.sunqian.fs.base.string
Provides utilities and interfaces for string related.
space.sunqian.fs.base.system
Provides utilities for system, OS, JVM and resource.
space.sunqian.fs.base.thread
Provides utilities and interfaces for thread.
space.sunqian.fs.base.value
Provides interfaces and classes for value and variable.
space.sunqian.fs.cache
Provides simple cache interfaces, with soft/weak reference implementation by default.
space.sunqian.fs.collect
Provides utilities for array, collection and stream.
space.sunqian.fs.concurrent
Provides utilities for concurrent related, such as Future.
space.sunqian.fs.data
This package and its subpackage provide utilities and interfaces to deal with data, such as JSON and Properties: ByteData: Core byte data interface; ByteDataParser: Core byte data parser interface; ByteDataFormatter: Core byte data formatter interface; CharData: Core char data interface; CharDataParser: Core char data parser interface; CharDataFormatter: Core char data formatter interface; DataKit: Utilities for all data; space.sunqian.fs.data.json: Subpackage for JSON; space.sunqian.fs.data.properties: Subpackage for Properties;
space.sunqian.fs.data.json
Provides utilities and interfaces for JSON: JsonData: Core data interface for JSON; JsonParser: Core parser for JSON; JsonFormatter: Core formatter for JSON; JsonKit: Utilities for JSON;
space.sunqian.fs.data.properties
Provides utilities and interfaces for Properties: PropertiesData: Core data interface for Properties; PropertiesParser: Core parser for Properties; PropertiesKit: Utilities for Properties;
space.sunqian.fs.di
This package is a simple dependency injection framework.
space.sunqian.fs.dynamic
This package and its subpackages provide varying degrees of dynamic runtime metaprogramming: DynamicKit: Dynamic utilities; DynamicClassLoader: Dynamic class loader; space.sunqian.fs.dynamic.proxy: Enables dynamic proxying capabilities; space.sunqian.fs.dynamic.aspect: Enables AOP (Aspect-Oriented Programming) features;
space.sunqian.fs.dynamic.aspect
Package for AOP (Aspect-Oriented Programming), provides makers to rapidly create aspect class with minimal effort, using codes similar to the following:
space.sunqian.fs.dynamic.aspect.asm
Provides aspect maker implementations by ASM, using codes similar to the following:
space.sunqian.fs.dynamic.proxy
Provides makers to rapidly create proxy class with minimal effort, using codes similar to the following:
space.sunqian.fs.dynamic.proxy.asm
Provides proxy maker implementations by ASM, using codes similar to the following:
space.sunqian.fs.dynamic.proxy.jdk
Provides proxy maker implementations by JDK, using codes similar to the following:
space.sunqian.fs.invoke
Provides unified interfaces to handle an invocable body, for example:
space.sunqian.fs.io
Provides utilities and interfaces for IO related, including subpackages.
space.sunqian.fs.io.communicate
Provides interfaces for IO communication, typically for network or IPC (Inter-Process Communication).
space.sunqian.fs.io.file
Provides utilities and interfaces for file and path.
space.sunqian.fs.net
Provides utilities and interfaces for network, such as Http client, TCP client and server, UDP sender and server.
space.sunqian.fs.net.http
Provides http utilities and interfaces to request http server with minimal effort, using codes similar to the following:
space.sunqian.fs.net.tcp
Provides builders to rapidly build TCP server and client with minimal effort, using codes similar to the following:
space.sunqian.fs.net.udp
Provides builders to rapidly build UDP server and sender with minimal effort, using codes similar to the following:
space.sunqian.fs.object
This package provides basic object related supports: ObjectKit: The utilities for objects; ObjectException: Base exception for object related errors; And its subpackages provide specific object related supports; space.sunqian.fs.object.schema: Defines schemas for data objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.builder: Defines steps for creating and building objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.convert: Converts and copies objects and properties; space.sunqian.fs.object.pool: Provides pool interfaces for objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.annotation: Provides annotations for object related operations;
space.sunqian.fs.object.annotation
This package provides annotations for object related operations, such as conversion and copying.
space.sunqian.fs.object.builder
This package provides builder related operations, it definitions and utilities for creating and building objects.
space.sunqian.fs.object.builder.handlers
 
space.sunqian.fs.object.convert
This package provides core interfaces and utilities for object conversion and copying.
space.sunqian.fs.object.convert.handlers
 
space.sunqian.fs.object.pool
This package provides simple way to create simple object pools:
space.sunqian.fs.object.schema
This package provides definitions and utilities for schemas, including map schema and non-map object schema.
space.sunqian.fs.object.schema.handlers
 
space.sunqian.fs.reflect
Provides utilities and classes for reflection related.
space.sunqian.fs.third
Provides support for third-party: ThirdKit: Third-party utilities; space.sunqian.fs.third.asm: For ASM; space.sunqian.fs.third.protobuf: For Protocol Buffers;
space.sunqian.fs.third.asm
Provides utilities for ASM.
space.sunqian.fs.third.protobuf
Provides support for Protocol Buffers.
space.sunqian.fs.utils
This package and its subpackages contain common non-core tools, including: space.sunqian.fs.utils.codec: For codec; space.sunqian.fs.utils.eventbus: Provides simple event-bus interfaces and implementations; space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc: Package for JDBC and SQL; space.sunqian.fs.utils.version: Semantic version; And a utilities kit for common operations: UtilKit.
space.sunqian.fs.utils.codec
Provides utilities for codec, including crypto, base64, hex, etc.
space.sunqian.fs.utils.eventbus
Provides simple event bus interface and default implementation: SimpleEventBus: Simple event bus interface;
space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc
This package provides JDBC and SQL utilities for database operations, for example:
space.sunqian.fs.utils.version
Provides classes and interfaces for semantic versioning.
